A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After correctly filtering Europe articles from 2010–2020 and retrieving all articles, the agent’s execute_python classification step (call id function-call-15631196488846651503) used naive substring keyword matching and tie-breaking that defaults to 'Business', which inflated business counts and led to an average of 370.82 instead of the ground-truth 336.64.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the final execute_python step (function-call-1461277561185928288), the agent used a simplistic keyword-based classifier that misclassified many business articles as world (e.g., including 'eu', 'european', 'union', 'eurozone' in world_keywords and failing to match tokens like 's&p'), leading to an undercount and a too-low average of 147.18 instead of 336.64.
